feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Data Services
feed.subtitle: SAP Data Services Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Error typing Vietnamese words in SAP
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

When I type in Vietnamese some complex words like "đại" in data fields, it changes to "d?i" or "vẫn" -> "v?n". Please help!

Regards.

entry.title: BAPI/ FM to load Customer master data with Data services
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Can you please suggest a BAPI/ FM that can be used to create a BP along with customer data like Company code, Address, sales etc..

We checked out RFC_CVI_EI_INBOUND_MAIN, but this is consuming the number range even when we are not committing the changes (i.e. IV_DOCOMMIT = " ").

Thank you so much for your help in advance!

Best Regards,
Het Patel

entry.title: SAP DATA SERVICSE Software Download
entry.content:
I am not able to find the location for Software download for SAP Data services

entry.title: How to access SAP Data Services designer without repository credentials?
entry.content:
How to access SAP Data Services designer without repository credentials?

entry.title: BODS Designer 4.3 crashes when loading the central repository.
entry.content:
Hello,
we have installed BODS Designer 4.3 for our developers on a terminal server. since 17.07.2024 we have the following problem.
BODS Designer 4.3 always crashes when we want to load job data from the central repository.
the tracing in the DSUserConfig.txt is set, but does not show any information in the DesignerTrace.csv that could cause the crash.
Only the following error message is available in the event viewer.
Repairing the Designer has not been successful .

Name of the faulty application: AL_Designer.exe, version: 14.3.3.300, timestamp: 0x6655a889
Name of the faulty module: ntdll.dll, version: 10.0.17763.5933, timestamp: 0x28f68183
Exception code: 0xc0000374
Fehleroffset: 0x00000000000fb199
ID of the faulty process: 0x6ec
Start time of the faulty application: 0x01dae311d7c725ff
Path of the faulty application: D:\Program Files (x86)\SAP BusinessObjects\Data Services\bin\AL_Designer.exe
Path of the faulty module: C:\Windows\SYSTEM32\ntdll.dll
Berichtskennung: 692b0d8f-a8eb-4483-9d07-69d85ab2bc19
Full name of the faulty package:
Application ID that is relative to the faulty package:

Could the problem be related to an update of the Windows 2019 server, or was it just a matter of time before Designer crashed?
Before 17.07.2024, working and loading jobs from the central repository worked.
Does anyone know the problem and more importantly, does anyone have a solution to the problem?
Thank you very much for your help.
Best regards Andreas

entry.title: How to create delta logic for ckis table
Service Layer SQLQuery Proxy error
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

I am trying to alter a SQLQuery as follows:

Patch Endpoint: https://<ip server>:50000/b1s/v1/SQLQueries('AquisitionCosts')

Body:

{
 "SqlCode": "AquisitionCosts",
 "SqlName": "AquisitionCosts",
 "SqlText": "select ItemCode, sum(APC) as APC from (select distinct ItemCode, TransType, APC from FIX1 where TransType in (110, 115, 120)) as v1 where ItemCode like '_________________' group by ItemCode"
}
 
The SQL is working fine but I do receive a proxy error howver:
<html>

<head>
    <title>502 Proxy Error</title>
</head>
<body>
    <h1>Proxy Error</h1>
    <p>The proxy server received an invalid
        response from an upstream server.<br />
The proxy server could not handle the request
    <p>Reason: <strong>Error reading from remote server</strong></p>
    </p>
</body>
</html>

entry.title: SAP Data Services 4.2 SP12 compatibility with Information Steward 4.2 SP14
entry.content:
Good Day!

We are trying to install SAP Information Steward in SAP Data Services (BODS) server. To install Information Steward we need to check the compatibility with SAP Data Services. Below is our SAP Data Services version:

How to read the version: 14.2.12.2309

  • 14.2 is SAP Data Services 4.2.
  • The second 12 means SP 12.
  • 2309 is the detailed patch number.

Could you please check and let us know if this version is compatible with Information Steward 4.2 SPS14 version

Thank you!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Extract sap success factors data and load into any database using sap bods
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Good day,

Team can we you please help guide me how to extract the data success factors data using sap bods.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to load multiple files from network SFTP & archive the files by CIDS after sending to IBP.
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

In CI-DS my interface is very clear: File to IBP.

As per the requirement,  My interface has to read the data from the SFTP location( MFT as source) and have to archive the files after post-loading the data to IBP. But here's the challenge is - as source is in network path and the DS agent/CIDS is in non-network location.

So if the interface made to read the multiple files through the CIDS with multiple data flows, but not able to perform the archiving by this approach.

Please help me on this issue.

Thanks,
Kalyan.

entry.title: Same LTMC Staging table throughout the SAP Environments
entry.content:
Hello,

Did anyone across a scenario where we have multiple SAP systems and we have to work with LTMC staging tables. The issue is the name of staging tables get changed in another sap system for same object.

Because of the different table name, we will be having difficulties manages the tables in BODS. Because if we want load data in another sap system, we will need to change the table. For example if we have 10 SAP systems then 10 different staging tables for the same object and we will have to manage those 10 tables each time we execute the BODS job.

Can anyone please explain if you have come across this scenario.

Thanks,

Imran

entry.title: Data Services - DF don´t do push down do DB
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I'm using SAP Data Services and I have a very simple data flow that reads an Oracle table,
chooses 8 fields and writes to another Oracle table. Both tables are in the same Data Base BUT IN DIFERENT schemas.
All the Data flows I have like this push down to the DB. Data Services creates the insert /*+ append*/ select ... statement.
This specifically does not do the push down... it does the select from the source table and the insert into the target using Data Services.
Push-down data flows can insert 15Millions records in 2 minutes. This Data flow takes 10 minutes to make 10M insertions.
Does anyone have any ideas about what is preventing DS to create the insert /*+ append*/ statement?
Thanks,

entry.title: Create Synthetic data in lower environments
entry.content:
Hello All,

Due to customer center sensitive, we cannot copy production data to the lower environments such as quality and SIT systems, and testing in lower system's is causing lot of trouble as we aren't having proper test data.

We need to create some synthetic data in SIT and quality systems, based on the data we have in production without copying it. Is there any possibility of this?

Eg: G/L Accounts and cost centers should be created with same configuration of Production system, but it shouldn't be a copy of them.

Any pointers will be helpful.

Thanks & Regards,

Naga

entry.title: BODS SAP DS file_move XML file processing
entry.content:
I have a an XML BODS processing job, processing many XML files at a time. 

Now I have a requirement, on an Linux server, using BODS function file_move, but it needs to only move one XML file to a different folder at a time, not all XML files. 

The reason is that some XML files might be badly formatted, and can't be processed by the BODS job, and those XML files need to go to a different folder after processing. 

 

Anyone had such a scenario before? Thanks!

entry.title: SAP BODS Connectivity with BW on Cloud
entry.content: Hi All - Our client is migrating their BW system from on-premise to cloud, can we connect to BW on cloud from SAP BODS (on premise) directly with updating the existing Datastore config ?

entry.title: Oracle 19c Database to S4 Table data migration using SAP DATA SERVICES
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am currently working on a migration project from an Oracle database to an S/4 HANA application system running on AWS. We have successfully set up datastore connections in SAP BODS for both the Oracle DB (datastore name: POFSN) and the S/4 HANA system (datastore name: SW1). Below is a brief overview of the connections:

S/4 HANA SYSTEM (SW1):

ORACLE Database (POFSN)

 

The issue arises when I attempt to drag a table (e.g., ADRC) from the SW1 datastore into the Dataflow in SAP BODS. I am not being given the option to set ADRC as the target table.

Is this process incorrect? What should I check to resolve this issue and ensure that tables from the S/4 HANA system can be used as target tables? 

Additionally, I would appreciate suggestions on other approaches to overwrite tables in S/4 HANA using SAP BODS.

Please let me know if any further information is required.

Thank you!

TAGS
SAP Data Services 
SAP S/4HANA 
Oracle Database

entry.title: Restrict downloading of BO reports from personal devices
entry.content:
Hi team,

We are planning to publish our BO production URL over the internet to access the system from user personal laptops and mobile devices.

Is there a way we can restrict users to download any reports to there personal devices?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: BODS Connectivity with Anaplan Data Hub
entry.content:
Hi

We have a requirement to Extract and load data to Anaplan Data Hub, Can we use BODS to extract/load the data directly using Anaplan API's, or do we need any other integrators in between?

entry.title: Single WF in SAP Data Services
entry.content: Can anyone please explain the sentence that is marked in yellow in the below screenshot?What exactly does different threads mean here?

entry.title: BODS Meta Data Table for Substitution Parameters/Configuration
entry.content:
Hi all,

I could find the details of the Global variables in this meta data table - AL_SETOPTIONS 

it looks like this table is not storing the details of the Substitution parameters/Config values.

My requirement is to list out all File Formats names in the system which uses some substitute parameters with some pattern Ex: $$BW****

Br

Kiran K
